marmap2 0.0.0.9000
  • Get started
  • Reference
    • Making and using bathymetric maps in R with marmap
    • Data import and export strategies in marmap
    • Analysing bathymetric data in R with marmap

marmap2

marmap2 imports, plots and analyses bathymetric and topographic data in R. It is a modernisation workspace for the historical marmap package, with tidier function names, updated documentation and newer data import workflows.

library(marmap2)

bathy <- get_noaa(
  lon1 = -6, lon2 = -5,
  lat1 = 49, lat2 = 50,
  resolution = 1
)

plot(bathy, image = TRUE, land = TRUE)

The package also includes an importer for the official GEBCO download service:

gebco <- get_gebco(
  lon1 = -6, lon2 = -5,
  lat1 = 49, lat2 = 50,
  resolution = 1
)
